hero.title: Get in touch.
About us.
hero.subtitle: We are dedicated to providing cutting-edge solutions for energy storage using hydrogen technology.

mission.label: Our mission
mission.title: Replacing fossil fuels with local green hydrogen.
mission.body: It is our mission to use the abundance of green energy to replace fossil fuels wherever they are used. We always produce the hydrogen locally, at your home or business, so you are in control of your own energy supply.
mission.body2: Renewable energy sources like wind power and solar are increasing rapidly, but to balance the energy grid and secure a stable power supply, the world is still counting on fossil fuel as an energy source. A year-round stable power supply without fossil fuels can only be achieved with local energy storage — and that's exactly what we deliver.

news.label: NEWS
news.title: What we have been up to.

card1.label: NEWS
card1.title: We attended Vakbeurs Energie
card1.body: We had a great time at Vakbeurs Energie, where we gave daily talks on becoming self-sufficient with hydrogen storage. We also discussed the business case for long-term storage and how it differs from battery storage.

card2.label: NEWS
card2.title: Tank hydrogen at SAIL Amsterdam
card2.body: SAIL Amsterdam is one of the biggest maritime events in the world, with more than 10.000 boats, and 2.3 million visitors a day. We are proud to power their fleet of hydrogen boats.

card3.label: NEWS
card3.title: Erik Blaauw pioneers with hydrogen system
card3.body: Our customer Erik Blaauw from Lelystad is the first to produce green hydrogen in the province of Flevoland. The NOS, Omroep Flevoland and Waterstof Magazine wrote about the opening event.

card4.label: NEWS
card4.title: Power2You gets grant
card4.body: We are proud to announce that we have been awarded a European grant through the EFRO programme Kansen voor West III for our innovation program Power2You. This contribution enables us to grow and continue investing in technical innovation.

card5.label: NEWS
card5.title: Hydrogen Innovation Award 2024
card5.body: Hermanos Energy has been recognised for an innovative hydrogen solution designed for local energy storage, catering to homes, farmers, and small businesses.

hero.title: One vision. Three products.
hero.subtitle: It is our mission to use the abundance of green energy to replace fossil fuels wherever they are used. We always produce the hydrogen locally, at your home or business.

intro.label: The system
intro.title: Green hydrogen, produced locally.
intro.body: On windy and sunny periods during the day the green energy supply exceeds the demand, which is leading to very low prices, and sometimes even free electricity. Green energy is cheap energy!
intro.body2: With the energy storage of Hermanos Energy you can benefit from the daily and seasonal price difference and contribute to net zero at the same time.

three.title: Choose your application.
three.subtitle: Depending on your energy needs, our hydrogen storage system can be configured for heating, electricity, or mobility.

heat.title: Power to Heat
heat.body: Using your summer sun to heat in the winter, with power to heat.

power.title: Power to Power
power.body: All year round green electricity with power to power.

drive.title: Power to Drive
drive.body: Driving a vehicle on hydrogen. With power to drive.

ems.label: Our OWN EMS
ems.title: The software behind it all.
ems.body: Green energy is all about timing, we make hydrogen when there is an abundance of green cheap electricity, and use it when you need it most, our software takes care of that.
ems.bullet1: Makes predictions based on your historical data, and the weather
ems.bullet2: Live connected to your solar panels and consumption.
ems.bullet3: Can scale up and down in milliseconds
ems.bullet4: Picks the right moments based on day ahead prices

hero.label: Power to Heat
hero.title: Using your summer sun to heat in the winter.

intro.label: How it works
intro.title: Store summer energy. Use it in winter.
intro.body: In summer, your solar panels produce more electricity than you can use or store in a battery. With Power to Heat, that surplus electricity is converted into hydrogen using an electrolyser. The hydrogen is stored locally and, when winter comes, converted back into heat.
intro.body2: This means you can heat your home or business entirely on the solar energy you generated months earlier — no fossil fuels required, no dependency on the grid.

b1.title: Seasonal storage
b1.body: Bridge the gap between summer production and winter demand with long-duration hydrogen storage.

b2.title: Zero fossil fuels
b2.body: Eliminate your gas bill entirely. Heat your home or business with 100% locally produced green hydrogen.

b3.title: Smart EMS control
b3.body: Our Energy Management System automatically decides when to produce hydrogen and when to release heat.

intro.label: How it works
intro.title: Green electricity whenever you need it.
intro.body: With Power to Power, surplus electricity from your solar panels is converted into hydrogen via electrolysis. When the sun isn't shining, a fuel cell converts that stored hydrogen back into electricity — giving you a reliable power supply 24 hours a day.
intro.body2: Unlike batteries, our hydrogen storage can hold energy for months, not hours. This makes Power to Power ideal for homes, farms, and businesses that want true energy independence.

b1.title: Long-duration storage
b1.body: Store weeks or months of energy as hydrogen — far beyond what any battery system can offer.

b2.title: Grid independence
b2.body: Reduce or eliminate your reliance on the electricity grid. Generate, store, and use your own clean energy.

b3.title: Price arbitrage
b3.body: Our EMS picks the best moments to produce hydrogen based on day-ahead electricity prices, maximising your return.

intro.label: How it works
intro.title: Fuel your vehicle with your own solar energy.
intro.body: With Power to Drive, surplus electricity from your solar panels is used to produce hydrogen on-site via an electrolyser. That hydrogen is stored and dispensed directly into hydrogen fuel cell vehicles.
intro.body2: We have demonstrated this at SAIL Amsterdam 2024, where our system fuelled a fleet of hydrogen-powered passenger boats — powering over 50 people per trip, with hydrogen produced the day before.

b1.title: On-site refuelling
b1.body: Refuel your hydrogen vehicle at home or at your business — no trips to a filling station required.

b2.title: Zero emissions
b2.body: Your vehicle emits only water vapour. Combined with locally produced green hydrogen, your total carbon footprint is zero.

b3.title: Proven in the field
b3.body: We powered hydrogen boats at SAIL Amsterdam 2024, demonstrating our system's reliability at scale.
